title: LoopCliConfig
description: Configuration for a loop-the-loop run. Matches the LoopCliConfig type defined in src/types.ts.

$schema.description: Optional URI to this JSON Schema, used by editors for validation.

name.description: Task name. Used for report filenames and git commit messages.

outputDir.description: Directory for report and state files. Defaults to the config file directory when loaded via the CLI.

maxPrompts.description: Stop after processing this many prompts. Unlimited when omitted.

interPromptPause.description: Seconds to pause between prompts. Helps with rate limits.

systemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt passed to the agent. Supports {{include:path}} macros resolved relative to the config file.

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the expected shape of structured output. Agent support varies.

allowedTools.description: Tool names auto-allowed without permission prompts. Agent-specific defaults apply when omitted.

allowSourceUpdate.description: When true, require a clean git working tree, allow agents to modify source, and commit after each successful prompt.

logger.description: Controls verbose diagnostic logging to stderr.

agentSpec.description: Which agent to use. Either a bare agent name (for agents that take no init config) or a [agentName, config] tuple.

mcpServers.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configurations. Keys are server names, values are server configs.

maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agent turns per prompt invocation.

promptGeneratorSpec.description: Tuple of [generatorName, config] selecting and configuring a prompt generator.

filePattern.description: Glob pattern for files to process (e.g. 'src/**/*.ts').

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template. {{file}} is replaced with each file path. Supports {{include:path}} macros.

basePath.description: Base directory for resolving {{include:...}} paths. Defaults to the config file directory.

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template. Substituted placeholders: {{id}}, {{summary}}, {{url}}, {{component}}, {{product}}, {{severity}}, {{status}}, {{assignee}}, {{whiteboard}}. Supports {{include:path}} macros.

basePath.description: Base directory for resolving {{include:...}} paths. Defaults to the config file directory.

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template. Substituted placeholders: {{id}}, {{number}}, {{repository}}, {{owner}}, {{repo}}, {{title}}, {{url}}, {{state}}, {{author}}, {{assignee}}, {{assignees}}, {{labels}}, {{milestone}}, {{commentCount}}, {{createdAt}}, {{updatedAt}}, {{closedAt}}, {{body}}. Supports {{include:path}} macros.

basePath.description: Base directory for resolving {{include:...}} paths. Defaults to the config file directory.

origin.description: GitHub REST API origin. Defaults to https://api.github.com. For GitHub Enterprise, use the API origin, for example https://github.example.com/api/v3.

token.description: GitHub bearer token. Prefer tokenEnv for CLI JSON configs.

tokenEnv.description: Environment variable name from which to read the GitHub bearer token. Defaults to GITHUB_TOKEN then GH_TOKEN.

apiVersion.description: GitHub REST API version header. Defaults to 2022-11-28.

userAgent.description: User-Agent header value for GitHub API requests. Defaults to loop-the-loop.

repository.description: Repository to search, in owner/repo form.

query.description: GitHub issue search syntax. The client adds repo:<repository> and is:issue.

sort.description: Sort field accepted by GitHub issue search, such as comments, created, or updated.

perPage.description: Number of results to request per API page. GitHub accepts 1 to 100.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of issues to return across all pages. When omitted, returns up to GitHub's 1,000-result search limit. Larger values are capped at 1,000.

dryRun.description: When true, skip the actual query and return an empty set.

logQuery.description: When true, log the query URL to stdout before sending.

origin.description: Bugzilla instance origin. Defaults to https://bugzilla.mozilla.org.

dryRun.description: When true, skip the actual query and return an empty set.

logQuery.description: When true, log the query URL to stdout before sending.

product.description: Restrict the search to a single product.

bugFields.description: Restrict the response to a subset of bug fields.

bugzillaChangeClause.description: Detect bugs whose 'field' changed from one value to another within the given window. Dates are parsed as UTC midnight.

field.description: Bugzilla field name to watch for changes (e.g. 'bug_status').

from.description: Start of the change window in yyyy-MM-dd format.

to.description: End of the change window in yyyy-MM-dd format.

value.description: The value the field changed to.
Value to compare against. Strings only; dates use 'yyyy-MM-dd' format.

data.description: Inline JSON value (array or object) to iterate over. Mutually exclusive with dataFile.

dataFile.description: Path to a JSON file to read. Resolved relative to basePath. Mutually exclusive with data.

path.description: Dot-notation path into the JSON to reach the array or object to iterate over (e.g. 'results.bugs').

idField.description: Field name on each element to use as the unique tracking ID. Defaults to the array index or object key.

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template. Placeholders for object elements: {{fieldName}}, {{id}}, {{index}}. For non-object elements: {{value}}. Supports {{include:path}} macros.

basePath.description: Base directory for resolving {{include:...}} paths and dataFile. Defaults to the config file directory.

source.description: Inner prompt generator. Same shape as the top-level promptGenerator tuple.

batchSize.description: Number of source prompts per batch.

summaryPromptTemplate.description: Template for the summary prompt injected after each batch. Available placeholders: {{batchSize}}, {{batchIds}}, {{reportFile}}. Supports {{include:path}} macros.

reportFile.description: Path to the report file the loop is writing to. Injected as {{reportFile}} in the summary template.

basePath.description: Base directory for resolving {{include:...}} paths in summaryPromptTemplate. Defaults to the config file directory.
